title: Chachoengsao Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chachoengsao with a Z-Score of +4.34. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Chachoengsao is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 60%, and the wind speed is approximately 9.3 km/h, which is not providing significant relief from the heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that there is no need for heating, and the focus is on cooling and mitigating the effects of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
